nodes.label: Tests for per-job workdir support in cron jobs.  Covers:   - jobs.create_job: pa
Isolate cron job storage into a temp dir so tests don't stomp on real jobs.
tick() must run workdir jobs sequentially (outside the ThreadPoolExecutor)     b
run_job sets TERMINAL_CWD + flips skip_context_files=False when workdir     is s
Patch enough of run_job's deps that it executes without real creds.
When workdir is absent, run_job must not touch TERMINAL_CWD at all —         wha
